content: do you know who is azlux on internet ?
Azlux is a social media influencer and content creator from the United Kingdom. He is best known for his comedy and lifestyle posts on Instagram and YouTube.

content: did he make any github project ?
Yes, Azlux has created several projects on GitHub, such as an app to help track your sleep, a website to generate funny GIFs, and a tool to help manage your Instagram posts.
